最新攻略 Map Exploration

异环全地图跑图与收集终极指南：从零探索海特洛 Ultimate Full-Map Running and Collection Guide: Exploring Hethereau from Zero

发布时间：Published: 2026-05-15 作者：异环攻略站编辑部Author: NTE Guide Editorial Team

攻略速览

海特洛的地图探索收益主要来自区域点亮、电话亭传送、谕石收集、异象委托和拍照打卡。先建立传送网络，再按区域清收集品，可以显著减少重复跑图。

前置条件与接取方式

核心目标

点亮区域轮廓，激活电话亭，逐步提升地图探索度

主要奖励

弧盘、玉石、探索经验、隐藏宝箱与异象委托奖励

推荐载具

优先购买新赫兰德区车行的25万方斯摩托车，机动性强且可随时召唤

海特洛高效跑图路线

先解锁传送，再清理收集

1

点亮维特海默塔

打开大地图缩到最小，前往灰色三角高塔图标

到塔下与NPC互动后，可点亮该区域完整轮廓，并解锁对应异象委托与传送权限。

2

激活ReroRero电话亭

靠近红色电话亭并互动

电话亭是最重要的快速传送点。激活后会永久显示在小地图上，支持跨区传送，建议开荒时优先顺路点亮。

3

顺路收集谕石

优先检查楼顶、高地和建筑边缘

谕石可在魔女之家兑换资源与经验，是探索度基础项。遗漏较多时可以使用水晶球扫描排查。

4

清理异象委托

按星级从低到高推进

点亮区域后即可接取异象委托。完成后可以清除地图红雾并解锁隐藏宝箱，流程较长或高难BOSS可留到后期处理。

5

完成拍照打卡

跟随拍照系列支线顺路完成

拍照打卡分布较散，跟着支线流程推进能减少大量往返时间，比单独查漏更高效。

跑图避坑

特殊传送点与隐藏机制

除了常规电话亭，地图上还有副本、世界BOSS、房产和深渊类传送入口。提前解锁这些点位，可以明显提升后续刷本与补收集效率。

  • 钻石楼楼顶电话亭较难发现，建议开荒前期专门跑一趟解锁，后续任务往返会方便很多。
  • 世界BOSS传送可在地图右下角“异象委托”中查找，包含无首铁驭、音霸魔王等BOSS入口。
  • 部分支线或异象需要特殊天气。如果流程卡住，可以尝试把天气切换为雨天后再前往目标点。

完成奖励

谕石兑换资源与经验 弧盘与角色养成资源 异象委托隐藏宝箱 拍照支线奖励 21的赠礼 世界BOSS与周本传送权限 地图100%探索度

跑图效率的关键是顺序：先点亮维特海默塔，再铺开电话亭传送网络，最后按区域清谕石、异象委托和拍照点。遇到极隐蔽收集品时，再配合互动地图查漏补缺。

完整解析

在《异环》的都市开放世界中，高效跑图与全收集不仅是探索乐趣，也是获取角色养成资源的重要来源。

开荒时建议先点亮维特海默塔，解锁区域轮廓与异象委托，再顺路激活ReroRero电话亭，建立跨区传送网络。

探索度主要由谕石、异象委托、21的赠礼和拍照打卡构成。建议结合主线与支线顺路完成，无需一开始就强行单刷全收集。

特殊传送点包括副本、世界BOSS、房产与轨外之境。提前解锁这些点位，可以让后续刷本、回家和高难挑战更加高效。

Guide Snapshot

Hethereau exploration rewards come from region reveal, phone booths, oracle stones, anomaly commissions and photo spots. Build the teleport network first, then clear collectibles by district to reduce repeated travel.

Requirements and Entry

Main goal

Reveal regional outlines, activate phone booths and raise exploration progress

Main rewards

Arc Plates, jade, exploration EXP, hidden chests and anomaly commission rewards

Recommended vehicle

Buy the 250,000-Fons motorcycle in New Herland early for strong mobility and easy summoning

Efficient Hethereau Route

Unlock teleports before collectibles

1

Activate Wertheimer Towers

Use the zoomed-out map and go to gray tower icons.

Talk to the NPC under the tower to reveal the region and unlock related commissions and teleport access.

2

Activate ReroRero phone booths

Interact with red phone booths when nearby.

Phone booths are the most important fast-travel points and should be unlocked while progressing.

3

Collect oracle stones along the way

Check rooftops, high ground and building edges first.

Oracle stones can be exchanged for resources and EXP at the Witch House. Use crystal-ball scanning if many are missing.

4

Clear anomaly commissions

Progress from low star to high star.

After towers are activated, commissions can be accepted. They clear red fog and often unlock hidden chests.

5

Finish photo spots

Follow photo side quests while moving through districts.

Photo points are spread out, so completing them with side quests saves travel time.

Exploration Pitfalls

Special teleports and hidden systems

Beyond ordinary booths, maps include dungeons, world bosses, housing and abyss-like entrances. Unlocking them early improves farming and cleanup efficiency.

  • The phone booth on top of Diamond Tower is easy to miss; unlock it early for later quests.
  • World boss teleports can be found from anomaly commission entries, including major boss portals.
  • Some side quests or anomalies require special weather. If stuck, try switching to rainy weather before revisiting.

Rewards

Oracle exchange resources Arc Plates and growth items Hidden anomaly chests Photo rewards Gift of 21 Boss and weekly teleports 100% exploration

Exploration efficiency is about order: towers first, phone booths second, then oracle stones, anomaly commissions and photo points by district.

Full Analysis

Efficient exploration is both fun and a major source of growth resources.

During progression, activate towers first to reveal regions and commissions, then unlock phone booths along the way.

Exploration progress mainly comes from oracle stones, anomaly commissions, Gift of 21 and photo spots. Do them alongside story and side quests instead of forcing 100% immediately.

Special teleports include dungeons, world bosses, housing and off-track realms. Unlocking them early makes later farming and challenges smoother.
